title: Refinitiv ESG Score
description: Environmental, Social, and Governance score data for a company as provided by the Refinitiv Data Platform ESG API, including overall scores, pillar scores, and category-level measures.

instrumentId.description: The instrument identifier (RIC or PermID) for the scored company.

companyName.description: The company name associated with the ESG score.

periodEndDate.description: The fiscal period end date for the ESG assessment.

esgScore.description: Overall ESG score combining all three pillars, ranging from 0 to 100.

esgCombinedScore.description: Combined ESG score factoring in controversies, ranging from 0 to 100.

environmentPillarScore.description: Environmental pillar score measuring resource use, emissions, and innovation, ranging from 0 to 100.

socialPillarScore.description: Social pillar score measuring workforce, human rights, community, and product responsibility, ranging from 0 to 100.

governancePillarScore.description: Governance pillar score measuring management, shareholders, and CSR strategy, ranging from 0 to 100.

esgGrade.description: ESG grade on a letter scale from D- to A+.

controversiesScore.description: Controversies score reflecting ESG-related negative news events, ranging from 0 to 100.

co2Emissions.description: Total CO2 equivalent emissions in tonnes.

co2EmissionsScope2.description: Indirect CO2 emissions from purchased energy (Scope 2) in tonnes.

industry.description: The TRBC industry classification of the company.

country.description: The country of domicile of the company.

CategoryScore.description: An individual ESG category score within a pillar.

categoryName.description: The category name such as Resource Use, Emissions, or Workforce.

score.description: The category score ranging from 0 to 100.

pillar.description: The parent pillar for this category.
